title: brassica monensis var. rectangularis
intro: Brassica monensis var. rectangularis, also known as Cornish oraz, is a variety of the Brassica monensis plant, a type of wild mustard. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various ailments such as digestive issues and respiratory problems, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Brassica monensis var. rectangularis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves or roots in hot water, or by combining them with other herbs for enhanced effects.
intro_study: According to "Evidence-based complementary and alternative medicine : eCAM", brassica monensis var. rectangularis, which is also known as watercress, has been reported to have various health benefits due to its high content of isothiocyanates, glucosinolates, polyphenols, vitamins, terpenes, and bioelements, including antioxidant, antibacterial, anticancer, and anti-inflammatory effects.
